title: hypericum stellatum
intro: Hypericum stellatum, also known as the starry St. John's Wort, is a perennial shrub native to the mountainous regions of central and southern Europe. It is a member of the Hypericum genus and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum stellatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hypericum stellatum, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
